zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Thornhill於1357年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾可普利時，她的父親Simon de Thornhill48歲，母親Elizabeth de Babthorpe22歲。她於1371年與Henry Savile在英國越可爾恩爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1437年在英國越可爾哈利法可享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Thornhill于1357年出生在英国英格兰越可爾可普利时，她的父亲Simon de Thornhill48岁，母亲Elizabeth de Babthorpe22岁。她于1371年与Henry Savile在英国越可爾恩爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1437年在英国越可爾哈利法可享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thornhill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called Thornhill, for example in Derbyshire, Yorkshire, Dorset, and Wiltshire, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Thornell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’, + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Thornhill was born in 1357, in Copley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Simon de Thornhill, was 48 and her mother, Elizabeth de Babthorpe, was 22. She married Henry Savile in 1371, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1437, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Thornhill est née en 1357, à Copley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon de Thornhill, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Babthorpe, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Savile en 1371, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1437, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Thornhill 1357 in Copley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon de Thornhill 48 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Babthorpe 22. Sie hat 1371 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England Henry Savile geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1437 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Thornhill è nata il nel 1357 nel Copley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Simon de Thornhill, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Babthorpe, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Henry Savile nel 1371, nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1437, nel Halifax, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Thornhillが1357年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアコプリーで生まれた時，父Simon de Thornhillは48歳，母Elizabeth de Babthorpeは22歳であった。1371年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルでHenry Savileと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1437年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Thornhill(이)가 1357년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 코플리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de Thornhill(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Babthorpe(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1371년 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 Henry Savile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1437년 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Thornhill nasceu em 1357, em Copley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon de Thornhill, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Babthorpe, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Savile em 1371, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1437, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Thornhill родилась в 1357 г. в местности копли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Simon de Thornhill было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Babthorpe, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Savile в 1371 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1437 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Thornhill nació en 1357, en Copley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon de Thornhill, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Babthorpe, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Henry Savile en 1371, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1437, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años.
